headline: Ingenico and Visa Collaborate to Accelerate Unified Commerce Solutions Across Industries
summary: Ingenico, a global leader in payment acceptance and services, has collaborated with Visa, a global leader in payments, to enhance and expand value with current and future clients. The solution combines Ingenico's Android-based AXIUM smart POS terminals with the Visa Acceptance Platform, including gateway and risk management services.
